# getObjectAtPath

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the getObjectAtPath query

## Usage

```bash
csdk get-object-at-path --dbId <UUID> --storeId <UUID> --path <String> --refname <String>
```

## Examples
